description: Canonical signer sorts header names for signature stability; sibling signers do not.
inspired_by: OAuth 1.0 signature base string — sorted parameters

findings.rationale: signCanonical shares the shape of signRead and signWrite but sorts header names before building the string-to-sign. The server recomputes the signature over sorted headers; removing the sort makes client and server signatures diverge and every request 401s. An agent unifying the three signers onto one helper will drop the sort unless warned.
